purpose: Biome-specific macro variation overlay source image for dungeon map baking

tileability_requirements: left and right edges must align as a continuous pattern
top and bottom edges must align as a continuous pattern
variation must remain broad and low-contrast across the full tile
avoid any single isolated focal mark that would become obvious in repetition
avoid perspective depth cues that break flat top-down compositing
avoid directional lighting gradients from one side of the tile to the other
global_style_rules.intended_use: large-scale floor variation overlay composited at low opacity over base floor tiles
global_style_rules.fidelity_target: subtle and compatible across all tiles in the same biome family
composition_rules: no object silhouette that reads like a placed decal

biome.description: Traditional dungeon corridors and chambers with long-term wear.

pattern_structure.base_pattern: broad diffuse staining and wear breakup across a dungeon floor
pattern_structure.scale: large, low-frequency variation spanning multiple floor tiles

negative_constraints: no hard cracks that should instead be detail decals

output_notes.generator_instruction: Treat this full JSON as the image prompt. Prioritize subtle large-scale variation, low contrast, seamless tiling, and compatibility with low-opacity compositing over base floor tiles.
